children.name: node3-1-2-3
children.memory:
**Improvements from Parent**
- Upgraded from AIDO.Cell-10M to AIDO.Cell-100M with LoRA r=8
- Replaced concatenation fusion with bilinear gene-class embedding head (gene_class_emb [3, 6640, 256], 5.1M params)
- Replaced SGDR (T_0=15, T_mult=2) with cosine annealing (T_max=200, 10-epoch warmup)
- Switched from Muon to AdamW lr=1e-4
- STRING_GNN K=16 2-head neighborhood attention

**Results & Metrics (vs Parent)**
- Test F1: 0.4459 vs parent 0.4407 (+0.0052)
- Sibling node3-1-2-2 (linear head): 0.4813 (+0.0354 above this node)
- Target node2-1-1-1-1-1: 0.5128 (-0.0669 gap)
- Training: 186 epochs, plateaued at val/f1=0.4459 from epoch ~170
- Val loss: 1.202 → 0.847 (monotonically decreasing)
- Train loss: ~0.85 (persistently high)
- Total optimizer steps: ~1116 (~6 steps/epoch)

**Key Issues**
- Micro_batch size defaulted to 4 instead of intended 32, causing accumulate_grad_batches=32 and only ~6 optimizer steps per epoch
- Only ~1116 total optimizer steps vs ~4004 in sibling node3-1-2-2 (3.6× fewer parameter updates)
- Bilinear head's 5.1M gene_class_emb parameters lacked sufficient gradient signal for per-gene specialization
- Cosine LR schedule decayed to near eta_min (1.5e-6) before bilinear head converged
- Chronic under-convergence indicated by high train loss (~0.85) with decreasing val loss
- Fix: set micro_batch=32 explicitly in code to achieve ~22 steps/epoch and ~5500 total steps over 250 epochs

children.name: node3-1-3
children.memory:
**Improvements from Parent**
- Replaced focal loss (gamma=2.0) with label-smoothed cross-entropy (ε=0.1) + sqrt-inverse-frequency class weights
- Replaced learnable attention-weighted layer fusion with STRING_GNN K=16 neighborhood attention (attn_dim=64, center-context gating, 98K trainable params) fused via concatenation (1280-dim)
- Reduced MLP head dimension from 512 to 256 (dropout=0.4)
- Maintained AIDO.Cell-10M QKV-only fine-tuning with Muon optimizer and CosineAnnealingLR (T_max=80, no restarts)

**Results & Metrics (vs Parent)**
- Val F1=0.437 at epoch 27 (vs parent 0.414, +0.023 improvement)
- Test F1=0.188 (identical to parent 0.188, no improvement)
- Val-test gap of -0.249 (exactly matches parent's failure mode)
- Sibling comparison: 0.188 vs 0.4325 and 0.4407 (significantly worse)
- Test predictions: 99.95% neutral argmax, mean class 1 probability=0.71 vs expected 0.925

**Key Issues**
- Catastrophic test failure: test F1=0.188 despite competitive val F1=0.437
- Learnable STRING neighborhood attention on frozen STRING embeddings creates training-specific patterns that fail to generalize
- Under-parameterized head (256-dim) combined with neighborhood attention produces degenerate predictions biased 99.95% toward neutral
- Validation metric is unreliable due to 92.5% neutral class distribution masking failure to learn discriminative DEG patterns
- Val-test gap exactly matches parent node3-1's failure, indicating architectural approach is fundamentally flawed

children.name: node3-1-3-1
children.memory:
**Improvements from Parent**
- Switched from AIDO.Cell-10M to AIDO.Cell-100M (last 6 of 18 layers QKV fine-tuned with Muon optimizer)
- Replaced learned STRING neighborhood attention with direct frozen STRING_GNN lookup embeddings (256-dim)
- Architecture: 640-dim AIDO gene embeddings concatenated with 256-dim STRING embeddings → 896→256→19,920 MLP head with dropout=0.4

- Best val F1: 0.4677 at epoch 33 (vs parent 0.437)

**Key Issues**

- Direct STRING lookup (no neighborhood aggregation) leaves ~0.04 F1 gap vs nodes successfully integrating STRING neighborhood structure
- Still ~0.04-0.05 F1 below tree-best performance

children.name: node3-1-3-1-1
children.memory:

- Switched from QKV-only fine-tuning (last 6 layers) to LoRA r=8 fine-tuning (all 18 layers)
- Replaced direct STRING lookup with K=16 single-head neighborhood attention (attn_dim=64) + summary token extraction
- Updated classification head: 2-layer 256-dim with dropout=0.5 (vs 896→256→19,920 MLP with dropout=0.4)
- Changed optimizer from Muon to AdamW lr=1e-4 with 10-epoch warmup and cosine annealing

- Early stopping at epoch 116 (vs parent epoch 46)

- Limited LoRA rank: r=8 (potentially insufficient, tree-best may use r=16)

children.name: node3-1-3-1-1-1
children.memory:
**Improvements from Parent**
- Changed from single-head to **2-head neighborhood attention** (attn_dim=64 per head, ~197K params vs ~90K in parent)
- Increased global batch size from 32 to **64**
- Extended training from 117 to 147 epochs (best at epoch 135 vs 100)

- Test F1: **0.4852** (regression of -0.0032 from parent's 0.4884)
- Trails tree-best by -0.0276
- Training stable with no overfitting
- Clear plateau after epoch 80 vs marginal gains after epoch 55 in parent
- Additional ~107K attention parameters provided no measurable benefit

**Key Issues**
- 2-head attention with larger batch size shifted optimization into a worse local optimum
- ~197K attention parameters excessive for 1,388-sample dataset
- Single-head parent configuration outperformed despite smaller capacity
- No evidence that additional attention head captures useful signal for this task

children.name: node3-1-3-1-1-1-1
children.memory:
**Improvements from Parent**
- Reverted to single-head neighborhood attention (from parent's 2-head)
- Expanded classification head to 3 layers: 896→512→256→19920 (from parent's 2-layer 896→256→19920)
- Reduced global batch size to 32 (from parent's 64)
- Increased weight_decay to 0.03 (from parent's lower value)

**Results & Metrics (vs Parent)**
- Test F1: 0.4725 (parent: 0.4852) → **Δ -0.0127**
- Training: peaked at epoch 99 with val/F1=0.4725, declined to 0.4645 by epoch 119
- Grandparent comparison: -0.0159 regression from single-head + 2-layer head (F1=0.4884)
- Training loss remained low despite validation F1 decline

**Key Issues**
- 3-layer head added ~400K parameters causing overfitting on 1,388-sample dataset
- Validation F1 peaked at epoch 99 then declined while training loss stayed low — clear overfitting signal
- Single-head revert, batch=32 reduction, and weight_decay=0.03 increase did not compensate for deeper head's negative impact

children.name: node3-2
children.memory:
